Slime Season

Slime Season [Cover Art V1]
Notes:
Official cover art for "Slime Season" used with the original release of the tape. Features a greek statue bust, blindfolded with blood dripping from its eyes, sat on a pedastal that lists "Slime Season" on the front. The art cuts off short of the bottom because it is not a 1:1 aspect ratio, leaving blank whiter space at the bottom.

Best Available Resolution: 640x640

Name: Slime Season [Cover V2]
Notes:
Updated cover art for "Slime Season" that corrects the bottom white space by subtley stretching the entire cover vertically, keeping the head centered but correcting the framing. Also adds Thug's name to the blank side of the pedastal.

Best Available Resolution:

Name: Slime Season [Cover V3]
Notes:
Official cover art for "Slime Season" used on the updated release of the tape. Similar to the previous version, but the YSL logo is updated and the image is overall a bit sharper. The art is still corrected to reach the bottom of the frame, but the text with Thug's name on the pedastal has been removed.
